backend/main.mo: Main Motoko actor for the backend, implementing user profiles, blog posts, contact messages, and grievances with role-based access control (admin/user) and blob storage mixins.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report mapping implemented features (hero section, about preview, services preview, why-choose-us, etc.) to their source files, components, test IDs, and confidence levels.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON document containing one-sentence summaries of every frontend source file, serving as a reference index for the project's frontend structure.
frontend/index.css: Base Tailwind CSS entry point defining OKLCH CSS custom properties for light and dark theme tokens (background, foreground, primary, sidebar, chart colors, etc.).
frontend/index.html: Minimal HTML shell titled 'CivicConnect' that mounts the React app at the #root div and loads the main TSX entry point as an ES module.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component that sets up TanStack Router with a shared Layout (Navigation + Footer) and defines routes for all 8 pages: Home, About, Services, Blog, Contact, Grievance, SocialMedia, and Signup.
frontend/src/components/Card.tsx: Simple reusable card wrapper component applying the 'civic-card' style class with optional hover cursor and className override support.
frontend/src/components/Footer.tsx: Site-wide footer with brand logo, quick links, support links, and contact info columns rendered on a dark teal background with a caffeine.ai attribution link.
frontend/src/components/Navigation.tsx: Responsive sticky navigation header with desktop and mobile (hamburger) menus, highlighting the active route using TanStack Router.
frontend/src/components/ProfileSetupModa: Modal dialog that collects a new user's name and email, validates the inputs, and saves the profile via the useSaveUserProfile mutation.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Custom hook that creates and caches an authenticated or anonymous ICP backend actor using TanStack Query, invalidating dependent queries whenever the identity changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an Internet Identity authentication context (login, clear, identity, status) via a React context and AuthClient, with a useInternetIdentity hook for consuming it.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Centralizes all TanStack Query hooks for the app, covering user profile, sign-up, blog posts, contact messages, and grievance CRUD operations against the ICP backend actor.
frontend/src/index.css: Global stylesheet that imports fonts, configures Tailwind, and defines the full set of CSS custom properties (light/dark themes) for the CivicConnect design system including civic-teal and civic-green tokens.
frontend/src/lib/utils.ts: Utility module exporting a cn class-merging helper and two timestamp formatting functions that convert nanosecond bigint values to human-readable date strings.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that mounts the React app wrapped with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider.
frontend/src/pages/About.tsx: Renders the About page for CivicConnect, displaying a hero section, mission statement, six core values (Transparency, Accountability, etc.), and a four-member team grid.
frontend/src/pages/Blog.tsx: Renders the Community Blog page, fetching posts via `useListBlogPosts` and displaying each as an expandable card with loading skeletons and error states.
frontend/src/pages/Contact.tsx: Renders the Contact page with a validated form (name, email, subject, message) that submits via `useSubmitContactMessage` and shows a success confirmation with a returned ID.
frontend/src/pages/Grievance.tsx: Renders the Grievance submission page with a validated form (name, email, category dropdown, description) that submits via `useSubmitGrievance` and displays a reference number on success.
frontend/src/pages/Home.tsx: Renders the Home page featuring a hero banner, a grid of 15 compliance services, and a 'Why Choose Us' stats section for YMW Compliance Services.
frontend/src/pages/Services.tsx: Displays a grid of eight civic services (e.g., Issue Reporting, Civic Education, Voting Information) each with an icon, badge, description, and link. Includes a hero section and a 'What We Offer' heading.
frontend/src/pages/Signup.tsx: Handles user authentication via Internet Identity, auto-registering new users on first login and showing a profile setup modal when no profile exists. Renders a benefits panel for unauthenticated users and account info for authenticated users.
frontend/src/pages/SocialMedia.tsx: Renders a page listing CivicConnect's six social media channels (X, Facebook, Instagram, LinkedIn, YouTube, GitHub) as styled cards with follower counts and external links.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Provides utility functions for reading URL query parameters from both standard and hash-based routing, persisting them in sessionStorage, and cleaning sensitive parameters from the URL hash without a page reload.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration extending the default theme with custom civic color tokens (teal, green, warm, slate) using OKLCH variables, custom fonts, box shadows, border radii, and plugins for typography, container queries, and animations.
project_state.json: Tracks the state of a multi-page React website for YMW Compliance Services LLP, including feature IDs, requirements, architectural notes, and project version metadata. Describes pages: Home, About, Services, Blog, Contact, Grievance, Social Media, and Signup with Internet Identity auth.
